en.metaDescription: Global Hub - Connect to the world's best information. Break free from information bubbles with curated high-quality websites across AI, tech, knowledge, news, and tools.
en.heroTitle: Connect to the World's Best Information
en.heroSubtitle: Break free from information bubbles. Discover the most valuable websites, curated for the curious mind.
en.footerText: Built for information equality. Open source on
en.tryDifferentKeywords: Try different keywords or browse categories
en.bangTip: Tip: Use !g for Google, !gh for GitHub, !yt for YouTube, !wiki for Wikipedia

zh.heroTitle: 连接世界最优质的信息
zh.heroSubtitle: 打破信息茧房，为好奇心精选全球最有价值的网站。
